description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a distinctive pattern of alternating black and speckled gray stripes running parallel across its top and sides. The stripes are evenly spaced, giving the block a modern, geometric appearance. The speckled gray areas resemble polished granite or marble, while the black stripes appear matte and solid. The block is thick and solid, with sharp, clean edges and a flat top surface suitable for supporting weight. There are no visible engravings, markings, or signs of significant weathering. Its robust construction and visual style suggest it is designed for use in urban environments, possibly as a barrier or decorative element.
description: A thick, rectangular stone block with alternating black and speckled gray stripes, featuring a flat, solid top and clean edges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the block with horizontal black and gray stripes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and vertical alignment of the stripes.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the striped pattern across the width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the vertical stripes and block thickness.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a leveled foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
